diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,178 @@
+# Helper Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/helper/factory/index.ts
+
+- Main exports or names: Factory, createFactory, createMiddleware
+- Reads as: ../../hono, ../../hono-base, ../../types
+- Neighbor files: src/hono/index.ts, src/hono-base/index.ts, src/types/index.ts
+- Safe summary: Factory helper provides app factory and middleware creation functions for creating Hono apps with multiple handlers or middleware.
+
+## src/helper/route/index.ts
+
+- Main exports or names: matchedRoutes, getParentPaths, basePath, addRoute, stripPath, matchRoute
+- Reads as: ../../router, ../../types, ../../http
+- Neighbor files: src/router/index.ts, src/types/index.ts, src/http/index.ts
+- Safe summary: Route helper provides utilities for analyzing and manipulating route paths and registered handlers.
+
+## src/helper/websocket/index.ts
+
+- Main exports or names: defineWebSocketHelper, WSUpgrade, WSContext, WSEvents, WSMessageReceive
+- Reads as: ../../context, ../../types, ../../utils/http-status
+- Neighbor files: src/context/index.ts, src/types/index.ts, src/utils/http-status/index.ts
+- Safe summary: WebSocket helper provides functions for upgrading HTTP connections to WebSocket and managing WebSocket context.
+
+## src/helper/cookie/index.ts
+
+- Main exports or names: getCookie, setCookie, getSignedCookie, setSignedCookie, generateSignedCookie, deleteCookie
+- Reads as: ../../context, ../../utils/cookie
+- Neighbor files: src/context/index.ts, src/utils/cookie/index.ts
+- Safe summary: Cookie helper provides functions for getting, setting, and managing cookies including signed cookies.
+
+## src/helper/testing/index.ts
+
+- Main exports or names: testClient
+- Reads as: ../../client, ../../context, ../../hono, ../../types, ../../utils/types
+- Neighbor files: src/client/index.ts, src/context/index.ts, src/hono/index.ts
+- Safe summary: Testing helper creates a test client that intercepts requests to a Hono app.
+
+## src/helper/adapter/index.ts
+
+- Main exports or names: env, getRuntimeKey, knownUserAgents, checkUserAgentEquals
+- Reads as: ../../context
+- Neighbor files: src/context/index.ts
+- Safe summary: Adapter helper detects runtime environment and provides access to environment variables for different platforms.
+
+## src/helper/css/index.ts
+
+- Main exports or names: css, cx, keyframes, viewTransition, Style, raw, rawCssString, CLASS_NAME, DEFAULT_STYLE_ID, cxCommon, cssCommon, keyframesCommon, viewTransitionCommon
+- Reads as: ../../helper/html, ../../jsx, ../../jsx/dom/css, ./common
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/html/index.ts, src/jsx/index.ts, src/helper/css/common.ts
+- Safe summary: CSS helper provides JSX-like API for managing CSS classes, styles, and animations.
+
+## src/helper/css/common.ts
+
+- Main exports or names: PSEUDO_GLOBAL_SELECTOR, DEFAULT_STYLE_ID, SELECTOR, CLASS_NAME, STYLE_STRING, SELECTORS, EXTERNAL_CLASS_NAMES, rawCssString, cssCommon, cxCommon, keyframesCommon, viewTransitionCommon, newCssClassNameObject, newKeyframesObject, createViewTransitionString
+- Reads as: (internal helper utility)
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/css/index.ts
+- Safe summary: Common helper utility providing shared CSS helper functions and symbols for both server and client.
+
+## src/helper/proxy/index.ts
+
+- Main exports or names: proxy
+- Reads as: ../../http-exception
+- Neighbor files: src/http-exception/index.ts
+- Safe summary: Proxy helper provides middleware for proxying requests to other servers with error handling.
+
+## src/helper/dev/index.ts
+
+- Main exports or names: getRouterName, showRoutes, inspectRoutes
+- Reads as: ../../hono, ../../types, ../../utils/color, ../../utils/handler
+- Neighbor files: src/hono/index.ts, src/types/index.ts, src/utils/color/index.ts
+- Safe summary: Dev helper provides utilities for displaying and inspecting app routes and router name.
+
+## src/helper/html/index.ts
+
+- Main exports or names: html, raw
+- Reads as: ../../utils/html
+- Neighbor files: src/utils/html/index.ts
+- Safe summary: HTML helper provides template string API for building HTML with automatic escaping and callback support.
+
+## src/helper/ssg/index.ts
+
+- Main exports or names: ssgParams, isSSGContext, disableSSG, onlySSG, defaultPlugin, redirectPlugin
+- Reads as: ./ssg, ./middleware, ./plugins
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts, src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts, src/helper/ssg/plugins.ts
+- Safe summary: SSG helper provides static site generation capabilities with route pre-rendering and SSG context control.
+
+## src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts
+
+- Main exports or names: generateSSGContext, fetchRoutesContent, fetchStaticRoutesContent
+- Reads as: ../../utils/filepath, .utils, .plugins
+- Neighbor files: src/utils/filepath/index.ts, src/ssg/params.ts
+- Safe summary: Core SSG implementation providing static content generation and file saving functionality.
+
+## src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts
+
+- Main exports or names: ssgParams, isSSGContext, disableSSG, onlySSG, SSG_DISABLED_RESPONSE, SSG_CONTEXT, X_HONO_DISABLE_SSG_HEADER_KEY
+- Reads as: ./utils, ../../context, ../../types
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/util.ts, src/context/index.ts, src/types/index.ts
+- Safe summary: SSG middleware provides hooks for param setup, SSG context detection, and SSG enable/disable control.
+
+## src/helper/streaming/index.ts
+
+- Main exports or names: stream
+- Reads as: ./stream, ../../context, ../../utils/stream, ./utils
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/streaming/stream.ts, src/helper/streaming/utils.ts, src/utils/stream/index.ts
+- Safe summary: Streaming helper provides Response streaming API for sending chunked responses efficiently.
+
+## src/helper/streaming/stream.ts
+
+- Main exports or names: stream
+- Reads as: ../../context, ../../utils/stream
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/streaming/stream.ts, src/utils/stream/index.ts
+- Safe summary: Core streaming function using TransformStream for efficient request streaming with error handling and cancellation support.
+
+## src/helper/streaming/sse.ts
+
+- Main exports or names: streamSSE, SSEStreamingApi
+- Reads as: ../../context, ../../utils/html, ../../utils/stream, ./utils
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/streaming/stream.ts, src/utils/html/index.ts, src/utils/stream/index.ts\
